preflight.note: Created before central ecosystem evidence aggregation; adopter changes were independently preflighted in adopter work items 034, 307, 203, 028, and 002.

acceptance_criteria.text: Every inventoried adopter identifies RepoPact 2.2.0 through its chosen consumption model.
Every adopter passes its governance validation and relevant native gate.
Every adopter upgrade is committed to and verified on its default branch.
Central evidence records the rollout and updates the research gap audit truthfully.
